zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean d'Harcourt VII, Comte d'Harcourt於1370年4月25日出生在法國諾門迪時，他的父親Jean d'Harcourt VI27歲，母親Catherine de Bourbon28歲。他於1389年3月17日與Marie D'Alençon在法國瑟結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1452年12月18日在法國波特-哈倫斯維安a特勒勞爾特享年82歲，埋葬在法國波特-哈倫斯維安a特勒勞爾特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jean d'Harcourt VII, Comte d'Harcourt于1370年4月25日出生在法国諾門迪时，他的父亲Jean d'Harcourt VI27岁，母亲Catherine de Bourbon28岁。他于1389年3月17日与Marie D'Alençon在法国瑟结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1452年12月18日在法国波特-哈倫斯維安a特勒勞爾特享年82岁，埋葬在法国波特-哈倫斯維安a特勒勞爾特。

nameMeanings.name: d'Harcourt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of the places in Eure and Calvados named Harcourt, from Old French cour(t) ‘court, farmyard’ (see Court ) with an obscure first element. This surname is very rare in France.

English: habitational name from either of two places in Shropshire named Harcourt. The one near Cleobury Mortimer gets the name from Old English heafocere ‘hawker, falconer’ + cot ‘hut, cottage’; the one near Wem has as its first element Old English hearpere (see Harper ).

History: The surname of French origin (see 1 above) is listed along with the equally rare or even extinct variants or altered forms Haraucourt, Herancourt, and Héraucourt in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

variants.name: Court
meanings: English: topographic or occupational name from Middle English curt, court ‘large house’ (a word of the same ultimately Latin origin as 2 below), denoting someone who lived or worked in a manor house or castle, a courtly retainer.
French: topographic name from Old French co(u)rt ‘court, farmyard’ (from Latin cohors, cors, genitive cohortis, cortis ‘court, farmyard, enclosure’).

English and French: nickname for a physically small man, or ironically for a large man, from the adjective Middle English curt, Old French co(u)rt ‘short, small’ (from Latin curtus ‘curtailed, truncated, cut short, broken off’). Compare French Lecourt .

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Jean d'Harcourt VII, Comte d'Harcourt was born on 25 April 1370, in Normandy, France, his father, Jean d'Harcourt VI, was 27 and his mother, Catherine de Bourbon, was 28. He married Marie D'Alençon on 17 March 1389, in Seine, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 18 December 1452, in Châtellerault, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, France, at the age of 82, and was buried in Châtellerault, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jean d'Harcourt VII, Comte d'Harcourt est né le 25 avril 1370, à Normandie, France, son père, Jean d'Harcourt VI, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Catherine de Bourbon, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Marie D'Alençon le 17 mars 1389, à Seine, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 18 décembre 1452, à Châtellerault, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, France, à l’âge de 82 ans, et a été enterré à Châtellerault, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jean d'Harcourt VII, Comte d'Harcourt am 25. April 1370 in Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jean d'Harcourt VI 27 und seine Mutter Catherine de Bourbon 28. Er hat am 17. März 1389 in Seine, Frankreich Marie D'Alençon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 18. Dezember 1452 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Châtellerault, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Frankreich und wurde in Châtellerault, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jean d'Harcourt VII, Comte d'Harcourt è nato il il 25 aprile 1370 nel Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Jean d'Harcourt VI, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Catherine de Bourbon, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Marie D'Alençon il 17 marzo 1389, nel Seine, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 18 dicembre 1452, nel Châtellerault, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, all'età di 82 anni, e fu sepolto a Châtellerault, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Jean d'Harcourt VII, Comte d'Harcourtが1370年4月25日にフランスノーマンディで生まれた時，父Jean d'Harcourt VIは27歳，母Catherine de Bourbonは28歳であった。1389年3月17日にフランスセアインでMarie D'Alençonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1452年12月18日にフランスポイトウ-チャーエンツヴィエンチaテラーアウルトで82歳で死去し，フランスポイトウ-チャーエンツヴィエンチaテラーアウルトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Jean d'Harcourt VII, Comte d'Harcourt(이)가 1370년 4월 25일 프랑스 노먼디에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jean d'Harcourt VI(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine de Bourbon(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1389년 3월 17일 프랑스 세이인에서 Marie D'Alençon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1452년 12월 18일 프랑스 포이토우-처츠 비니 cha텔레라트에서 82세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 포이토우-처츠 비니 cha텔레라트에 묻혔다.

mn.25 April 1370–18 December 1452: 1370 оны Дөрөвдүгээр сарын 25–1452 оны Арванхоёрдугаар сарын 18

pt.25 April 1370–18 December 1452: 25 de abril de 1370–18 de dezembro de 1452
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jean d'Harcourt VII, Comte d'Harcourt nasceu em 25 de abril de 1370, em Normandie, França, seu pai, Jean d'Harcourt VI, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Catherine de Bourbon, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Marie D'Alençon em 17 de março de 1389, em Seine, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 18 de dezembro de 1452, em Châtellerault, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, França, com 82 anos, e foi sepultado em Châtellerault, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean d'Harcourt VII, Comte d'Harcourt родился 25 апреля 1370 г. в местности норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Jean d'Harcourt VI было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine de Bourbon, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Marie D'Alençon 17 марта 1389 г. в местности син, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 18 декабря 1452 г. в местности чaтеллираулт, виенн, поитоу-чарентесь, Франция в возрасте 82 лет и был похоронен в местности чaтеллираулт, виенн, поитоу-чарентесь, Франция.

es.25 April 1370–18 December 1452: 25 de abril de 1370–18 de diciembre de 1452
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jean d'Harcourt VII, Comte d'Harcourt nació el 25 de abril de 1370, en Normandie, Francia, su papá, Jean d'Harcourt VI, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Catherine de Bourbon, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Marie D'Alençon el 17 de marzo de 1389, en Seine, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 18 de diciembre de 1452, en Châtellerault, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, a la edad de 82 años, y fue sepultado en Châtellerault, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Francia.
